OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

THEHIVE_CHECK_SSL.description: Verify SSL certificates when connecting to TheHive.

THEHIVE_ORGANIZATION_NAME.description: TheHive organization name used as the identity in OpenCTI.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_FROM_DATE.description: Start date for importing data from TheHive (ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2021-01-01T00:00:00).

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ALERTS.description: Import alerts from TheHive in addition to cases.

THEHIVE_IMPORT_ATTACHMENTS.description: Enable or disable the import of case attachments from TheHive.

THEHIVE_SEVERITY_MAPPING.description: Mapping of TheHive severity levels to OpenCTI severity labels (format: level:label,level:label).

THEHIVE_CASE_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Mapping of TheHive case statuses to OpenCTI status IDs (format: TheHiveStatus:OpenCTI_Status_ID).

THEHIVE_TASK_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Mapping of TheHive task statuses to OpenCTI status IDs (format: Waiting:ID1,InProgress:ID2,Completed:ID3).

THEHIVE_ALERT_STATUS_MAPPING.description: Mapping of TheHive alert statuses to OpenCTI status IDs (format: TheHiveStatus:OpenCTI_Status_ID).

THEHIVE_USER_MAPPING.description: Mapping of TheHive assignee emails to OpenCTI user IDs (format: email1:userID1,email2:userID2).

THEHIVE_INTERVAL.description: Polling interval in minutes between data fetches from TheHive.

THEHIVE_CASE_TAG_WHITELIST.description: Comma-separated list of tags; only cases with these tags will be imported.
